articles.title: Sapiom CEO: Software is becoming the ‘customer' of the Internet
articles.summary: A CEO-level perspective argues that AI agents are becoming the primary "customers" of the internet, signaling a fundamental shift in how authentication and identity systems must evolve to handle non-human software identities at scale.

articles.title: Bringing governance and visibility to machine and AI identities
articles.summary: AppViewX CEO discusses the convergence of machine and AI agent identity management, highlighting governance and visibility challenges that IAM professionals must address as AI adoption accelerates.

articles.title: The death of standing privilege in the age of AI agents
articles.summary: This article argues that AI agents are emerging as highly privileged non-human identities that traditional PAM controls are ill-equipped to manage, signaling a critical evolution in privileged access management strategy for IAM professionals.

articles.title: Google Chrome Update Disrupts Infostealer Cookie Theft
articles.summary: Google's Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) in Chrome 146 binds session cookies to hardware keys on Windows, directly countering infostealer-based session hijacking attacks that bypass MFA and SSO protections — a meaningful defense for IAM professionals managing browser-based authentication risks.

articles.title: UNC6783 Hackers Use Fake Okta Pages in Corporate Breach Campaign
articles.summary: Google's Threat Intelligence Group warns of UNC6783, a threat actor conducting targeted corporate breaches via fake Okta login pages and social engineering impersonation of IT support staff, posing a critical phishing and credential theft risk for organizations using Okta SSO.

articles.title: To counter cookie theft, Chrome ships device-bound session credentials
articles.summary: Google Chrome is shipping device-bound session credentials (DBSC) to cryptographically tie authentication cookies to specific devices, directly countering infostealer-based session hijacking attacks that bypass MFA and threaten enterprise SSO sessions.
